queries.question: What equipment is common for all photojournalists?
queries.sql: SELECT Equipment.type  from Photojournalist_Equipment join Equipment on Photojournalist_Equipment.equipment_id = Equipment.equipment_id join Photojournalists on Photojournalist_Equipment.photojournalist_id = Photojournalists.id   GROUP BY Photojournalist_Equipment.equipment_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Photojournalist_Equipment.photojournalist_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Photojournalists)

queries.question: For every photojournalist, list the equipment they use.
queries.sql: select photojournalists.name , equipment.type from Photojournalist_Equipment join Equipment on Photojournalist_Equipment.equipment_id = Equipment.equipment_id join Photojournalists on Photojournalist_Equipment.photojournalist_id = Photojournalists.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?photojournalist_equipment a :Photojournalist_Equipment .
  ?equipment a :Equipment .
  ?photojournalist_equipment p:hasEquipment ?equipment .
  ?photojournalists a :Photojournalists .
  ?photojournalist_equipment p:hasPhotojournalists ?photojournalists .
  ?photojournalists p:name ?name .
  ?equipment p:type ?type .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the equipment each photojournalist uses.
